narration: Ever wondered why AI sometimes makes things up?
visual_description: Hook visual: Ever wondered why AI sometimes makes things up?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why AI sometimes makes things up?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Ever wondered why AI sometimes makes things up?

narration: AI language models predict what words should come next, based on patterns in data.
visual_description: Context visual: AI language models predict what words should come next, based on patterns in data.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: AI language models predict what words should come next, based on patterns in data.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: AI language models predict what words should come next, based on patterns in data.

narration: But they’re not programmed to verify truth. They generate what's plausible.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But they’re not programmed to verify truth. They generate what's plausible.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But they’re not programmed to verify truth. They generate what's plausible.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But they’re not programmed to verify truth. They generate what's plausible.

narration: This leads to 'hallucinations' — confident statements that aren’t accurate.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This leads to 'hallucinations' — confident statements that aren’t accurate.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This leads to 'hallucinations' — confident statements that aren’t accurate.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This leads to 'hallucinations' — confident statements that aren’t accurate.

narration: Understanding this helps us use AI more wisely, knowing it’s not always reliable.
